message:
feat(cli,db,server,share): local send_message fallback, reconstruct expansion, ATC routing refinements, crypto/probe hardening

CLI (mcp-agent-mail-cli):
- Refactor mail send command to fall back to local tool execution when
  the server rejects a send_message with a scope mismatch, instead of
  immediately failing — enables graceful degradation when server-side
  tool scope does not cover the requested project
- Add call_send_message_tool_locally() helper that invokes the
  send_message tool handler directly, bypassing the server RPC path
- Add server_message_payload_to_cli_json() to normalize server tool
  response payloads into the CLI's expected JSON shape
- Expand robot output module with additional structured reporting fields

DB (mcp-agent-mail-db):
- Major expansion of the reconstruct module with improved archive
  recovery, message coalescing, and reconstruction logic for handling
  partial or corrupted mail archives
- Minor search planner additions for query optimization

Server (mcp-agent-mail-server):
- ATC (Air Traffic Control) routing refinements with expanded adaptation
  logic, verification improvements, and more granular route handling
- Minor server lib adjustments

Share (mcp-agent-mail-share):
- Bundle format additions for extended archive packaging
- Crypto module expansion with additional encryption and verification
  capabilities for secure message exchange
- Probe diagnostic improvements for better runtime health reporting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
